item.title: This Week in Tech 663 Reasonably Miserable
item.description:
You need to listen to this Twit episode.

This Week in Tech 663 Reasonably Miserable | TWiT.TVPlease remember to subscribe to the newsletter or feed to stay up to date!

item.title: This Week in Tech 639 Anywhere but Albany
item.description:
Good discussion on Facebook and Twitter in This Week in Tech (TWiT 639: Anywhere but Albany):

_You can find all my shares on my Facebook Page_Please remember to subscribe to the newsletter or feed to stay up to date!
